title: centaurea seridis subsp. maritima
intro: Centaurea seridis subsp. maritima, a subspecies of the Centaurea seridis plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family that thrives in coastal areas and is also known as the sea centaury. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Centaurea seridis subsp. maritima can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to utilize its medicinal and health benefits.
